notes: Nested table content is start-aligned without resizing or repositioning message panels.
Startup now uses a lightweight start-at-bottom flow instead of scroll state restoration.
No history scroll restoration override or sessionStorage scroll state remains.
Popup now supports three saved custom theme slots, delete actions, and a lightweight loading layer during apply/save/delete clicks.
The separate top Edit button is removed; custom theme card buttons now open and close the editor directly.
Custom theme outlines now depend on explicit Apply actions instead of only matching the current preview colors.
Fixed a popup startup crash caused by reading the default preset key before the preset map was initialized.
The footer button now toggles back to Enable Theme when disabled and uses a green re-enable state.
Editing now previews live without becoming the applied selection, and saving a custom slot restores the previously selected theme source.
Writing blocks now have a dedicated editor surface color, while their outer shell uses the Content panels surface.
Older saved themes inherit Content panels for the new writing-block surface instead of falling back to an unrelated default color.
The built-in writing-block defaults are darker and less saturated so the popup swatches no longer look overly bright.
Midnight Blue specifically uses a slightly darker writing-block tone than the other recent defaults.
No table DOM observer, inline table positioning, polling, or computed-style scan remains.
